title: calophyllum teysmannii var. bursiculum
intro: Calophyllum teysmannii var. bursiculum, also known as Borneo canarium, is a species of plant in the family Calophyllaceae, native to the island of Borneo in Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Borneo canarium include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and preventing the growth of certain microorganisms, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Borneo canarium is often used as an ingredient in topical creams, ointments, and salves, as well as in traditional remedies such as teas and infusions.
